Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Gown)

Neck & Sleeves: Neck: Square Neck || Sleeve Length – Full Sleeves || Sleeve Style – Rollup

Fabric & Lining: Crafted from heavy pure soft fox georgette fabric layered with a premium pure microscrape full lining.

Work & Details: Features fancy embroidery 9 needle thread work on the yoke, paired with full churidar sleeves. The bodice is padded and designed with a convenient side zipper.

Volume & Structure: Styled with a stunning three-layer gathering pattern creating a massive 8 meter plus full flare, complete with an attached canvas patta for a perfect structured drape.

Length: Anarkali length measures approximately 54 inches.

Bottom (Pant)

Fabric: Made from premium pure microscrape silk fabric.

Fit: Free-size, fully stitched regular-fit trousers designed for effortless comfort.

Dupatta

Fabric & Size: Crafted from pure soft fox georgette fabric with a total length of 2.2 meters.

Style & Design: Features a beautiful and trendy ruffle style layout that adds a graceful, modern charm to the ethnic outfit.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
